title: Document with draw.io diagram
excerpt:
Hi there, 
Iv’e seen that there is a possibility to integrate Draw.io in Monday’s marketplace. 
After Iv’e added the app into my board->“new doc” I couldn’t find how to actually start a new diagram?

posts.cookedHtml:
